claim_boundary: Tier 5.19b is software benchmark/sham gate evidence only. It may recommend promotion, narrowing, or repair, but does not freeze a baseline by itself and does not authorize hardware migration.

classification.recommendation: Consider a narrowed fading-memory candidate or repair recurrence; do not promote or claim recurrence-specific value from this tier.

fairness_contract.hardware_policy: software-only; hardware blocked until promotion and compact regression
nonclaims: not recurrence-specific proof unless classification says so
fairness_contract.normalization: train-prefix z-score for tasks; train-prefix feature normalization for online readouts
fairness_contract.tier: Tier 5.19b - Temporal Substrate Benchmark / Sham / Regression Gate
